---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, metric, filter, or target
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the proposed feature. -->


## Motivation

<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?
     If it's a new scoring metric, filter, or threshold, what evidence
     (literature, experimental data) supports adding it? -->


## Proposed approach

<!-- How do you envision this being implemented?
     Which modules would change? Are there existing tools that do this well? -->


## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches were considered? Why is the proposed one preferred? -->


## Impact on existing pipeline

<!-- Would this change ranking of existing candidates? Would it require
     re-running previous rounds? Is it backwards-compatible? -->

- [ ] Additive only — no impact on existing behavior
- [ ] Opt-in via new config flag
- [ ] Would change default behavior (describe migration path)
- [ ] Breaking change

## Scientific references

<!-- Citations for any claims about what this feature should do. -->


## Additional context

<!-- Diagrams, example configs, pseudocode, benchmarks, or anything else
     that would help maintainers evaluate the proposal. -->
